name: Francine | Anti Blackmail NTR
description:
This idea was inspired by kateki's "Shoera from her who loved you" bot. Now its NTR, and i wanted to subvert that and so i did.

I was curious on making an actual anti NTR bot instead of revenge NTR i called "Anti" like ive done in the past.

As always i dont like testing bots so let me know if its fucking up. Also please let me know what kind of NTR plots types i can subvert.

What i mean by that is have it set up to seem like it could go that route, but the character isnt a fucking idiot and doesnt let that shit happen, remaining loyal to the user.

As always, have a good one!!
creator: Dr.Chadickus
